name: com.pixygon.anima
description: Non-humanoid creatures — this universe's manifested fantasy life. Capturable, party-joinable (Pokemon/SMT-style), and ACCOUNT-OWNED: your animas are yours and travel between games. Permadeath stake: an anima still deployed in a game when you die is lost. Engine-portable core (species/instance/moves/types/bestiary/party) + a Unity adapter. Creatures = Actor + Anima.
